info.name: Cloudflare Turnstile API
info.description:
Cloudflare Turnstile is a CAPTCHA replacement that verifies visitors without showing a challenge. The API provides a server-side siteverify endpoint for token validation and management endpoints for creating and configuring Turnstile widgets with support for managed, non-interactive, and invisible modes.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cloudflare Support
